message:
fix(tmux): enable buffer-based delivery for Claude Code multi-line prompts

send-keys -l silently strips newlines (tmux 3.6+), while paste-buffer
converts them to CR which terminal apps interpret as Enter. Claude Code
was excluded from buffer-based sending, causing multi-line auto-injected
prompts to arrive as a single concatenated string without submission.

Add AgentClaude case to needsBufferSend() matching the existing
AgentGemini pattern: use buffer when content contains newlines.

Closes #86

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
